name: Slow Cooked Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Season whole uncut slabs of pork ribs with salt and pepper.
2. Cook slowly in a smoker using low heat (220°F maximum) for two hours.
3. Baste the ribs every half hour with a mixture of equal parts tomato-based barbecue sauce, white vinegar, and sparkling water for the next three hours.
4. For the final hour of cooking, baste the ribs with a mixture of equal parts barbecue sauce and sparkling water.
5. Serve with plenty of sauce on the side.
Note: The ribs will have cooked a total of six hours.
